title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
